title: CAM, Trilegal, SAM act on Bharti Airtel, Carlyle, Alpha Wave investing $1 billion in Airtel's Nxtra Data
description: Bharti Airtel, Carlyle Group, Alpha Wave Global and Anchorage Capital are set to invest $1 billion into Airtel’s data centre arm, Nxtra Data Limited.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas is advising the Bharti Group on this investment.The transaction team is led by Ravindra Bandhakavi (Senior Partner), Anandita Kaushik (Partner).Dhruv Rajain (Partner) advised on the competition law aspect.Ravindra Bandhakavi, Anandita KaushikTrilegal is advising the Carlyle Group on this investment.The transaction team is l
